description: Onboarding presents location permission request. CLLocationManager requests 'Always Allow' for background zones and iBeacons.

flow_steps.details: Onboarding screen explains location use and requests permission.
CLLocationManager configured for always-on background location with significant change monitoring.

description: Onboarding requests motion permission for activity and pedometer sensors.

flow_steps.details: Onboarding multi-permission screen includes motion/fitness permission.
MotionActivity sensor queries CoreMotion for activity type and confidence.

description: Onboarding or first barcode scan triggers camera permission request via AVCaptureDevice.

flow_steps.code: private func checkAuthorization() async -> Bool { AVCaptureDevice.requestAccess(for: .video) }
flow_steps.details: First camera access triggers system permission dialog for NSCameraUsageDescription.

description: Voice recording or on-device speech triggers microphone permission request via AVAudioSession.

flow_steps.details: First audio recording triggers system microphone permission dialog.

flow_steps.code: private func setupAudioRecorder() { let audioSession = AVAudioSession.sharedInstance(); try audioSession.setCategory(.record) }
flow_steps.details: AVCaptureSession configured with microphone input for Assist voice recording.

description: App registers for remote notifications and requests alert/sound/badge permissions via UNUserNotificationCenter.

flow_steps.details: App registers for remote notifications via APNs.
APNs device token forwarded to Firebase Messaging for push notification delivery.

description: On-device speech transcription triggers SFSpeechRecognizer authorization request.

flow_steps.code: public func requestPermission() async throws { SFSpeechRecognizer.requestAuthorization { ... } }
flow_steps.details: Speech recognition permission requested for on-device STT.

description: Improv device provisioning triggers Bluetooth permission request via CBCentralManager.

flow_steps.code: func requestAuthorization() { cbManager = CBCentralManager(delegate: self, queue: nil) }
flow_steps.details: CBCentralManager initialization triggers system Bluetooth permission dialog.

flow_steps.code: struct ImprovDiscoverView<Manager>: View where Manager: ImprovManagerProtocol
flow_steps.details: BLE scanning for Improv-compatible devices on local network.
